title: Virtual Anvil
description: A virtual Anvil for your minecraft server which allows players to use an unbreakable anvil with "/anvil, /va" commands.
body:
# 📦 VirtualAnvil
VirtualAnvil is a simple and lightweight Minecraft plugin that allows players to open an anvil interface anywhere using a command. No need to place or carry an anvil — perfect for survival, SMP, and QoL-focused servers. This plugin is made by **Ayl**

# ✨ Features
🔨 Open an anvil anytime, anywhere
⚡ Lightweight & optimized
🔐 Permission-based access
💬 Customizable messages
🧩 Works seamlessly with vanilla mechanics
🟢 Supports modern Minecraft versions
⌨️ Commands

```/anvil``` & ```/va```

Opens a virtual anvil GUI.

# 🔑 Permissions

```virtualanvil.use```

Allows players to use the /anvil command.

# ⚙️ Configuration
Easily editable config file
Customize plugin messages
Enable or disable features as needed

# 🎯 Use Cases
Survival & SMP servers
Economy servers
Convenience / QoL improvements
Servers wanting less block clutter

# 🚀 Why VirtualAnvil?
Because convenience matters. VirtualAnvil keeps gameplay smooth without breaking immersion or balance.
